name: Predictions 2020: Three Trends Driving Change in Digital Marketing
rich_text_block:
Digital marketing has changed the way we buy and sell products. What new advancements can we expect over the next decade to make purchasing decisions even more personal and accessible?

The three channels expected to see the most change over the next decade will be local marketing, social media, and voice/AI-powered devices.

In this report, you will find:

  • The top 5 digital marketing predictions for 2020
  • Strategies to get your business ready for the new decade in consumer search
  • How to implement growing technologies and acquire new customers

seo.title: Predictions 2020: Three Trends Driving Change in Digital Marketing
